channel.title: AI Pulse Checker — AI Tool Reviews & Adoption Data
channel.description: 196 honest AI tool reviews, adoption trends, and citation data. Updated weekly.

item.title: Weekly Adoption Report: March 10, 2026
item.description: Claude Pro citations up 31%, Sora down 12%, and three new tools entered our tracking.

item.title: New This Week: Pomelli, Moda, and Seedance
item.description: Three new tools reviewed with full 40+ hour testing. Google Pomelli scores 8.9, Moda scores 9.3.

item.title: Cursor vs Claude Code: The AI Coding Editor War
item.description: We tested both for 40+ hours. Here's why Cursor still leads and where Claude Code is catching up.

item.title: The Rise of Vibe Coding
item.description: AI code editors are turning non-developers into app builders. We analyze the trend.

item.title: Why Your Page Disappeared from Perplexity Citations
item.description: We analyzed 500 pages that lost AI citations. The #1 reason was a simple technical fix.

item.title: How to Choose an AI Writing Tool in 2026
item.description: With 27 AI writing tools in our directory, here's the decision framework we use.

item.title: AI Tool Price Tracker: February Changes
item.description: ElevenLabs raised prices, Midjourney dropped theirs, and three tools went freemium.
